purpose: Demonstrate the E1 intake-to-goal-spec contract and the E2 plan-to-build route handoff.
background: Created from fixtures/c8-new-flow/intake.json section_0.executive_summary and section_3.purpose_excavator.
goal: A generated goal-spec records source_intake and the handoff route can be consumed without additional questions.

checklist.criterion: The generated goal-spec includes purpose/background content from intake.json.
The generated handoff contains a route for demo-boundary-skill.

constraints: Do not ask additional questions when intake_json is provided.
